[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / abs

# Method: abs()

```ts
abs(value): number;
```

Calculate the absolute value of a number.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to make positive. |

## Returns

`number`

Absolute value.
